art_highlights: Global art market grew 4% in 2025 ($59.6B); optimism high for 2026 (43% of dealers expect growth).
High-end segment focus: lots >$1M grew 21% in value.
Whitney Biennial 2026 in NYC runs until August 23.
Carol Bove at the Guggenheim continues until August 2.
Monet and Venice now open at the de Young Museum.

market_summary.market_sentiment: Negative; escalation of Middle East conflict causing global volatility.
market_summary.key_drivers: Escalation in Iran conflict, US S&P 500 down 1.49% to 6,508, tech sell-off (Mag 7 down), 'triple witching' volatility.
market_summary.trend: Global equities exhibit mixed performance with significant US declines; Europe trading slightly higher.
ft_briefing_insights: Energy sector short-term benefit from Iran conflict; hedge with consumer/transport/aviation.
Fed 'higher for longer' stance; prefer value/dividend stocks over growth.
AI cloud infrastructure competition (MSFT vs AMZN) intensifying legal risk; AI safety regulations remain a key headwind.
EU M&A deregulation supports European industrial/defense sectors.
